rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER STARKEY VS. CLEM LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 128.7 To Defendant Clem, Llc And Property Resource Management And Their Attorneys Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER STARKEY and KATHIE STARKEY's Motion For Sanctions Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 128.7 To Defendant Clem, Llc And Property Resource Management And Their Attorneys Of Record DENIED.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER STARKEY VS. CLEM LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Clem Llc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2018 line 1. Defendant Clem Llc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and set forth any statute or case standing for the proposition that live/work units are not subject to habitability laws. Motion for summary adjudication is denied for additional reason for failure to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WINI WONG VS. DENNIS LETBETTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs' DENNIS LETBETTER, and JANE KOEGEL's AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT overruled 5 days to answer.
